description_long: This object is a vintage-style television set with a boxy, wooden exterior and a large, convex yellow-green screen framed by a metallic bezel. The front panel features three large, round dials arranged vertically on the right side, likely for channel and volume control, and a set of buttons and switches on top, possibly for power and tuning. A metallic dome with two thin, black antenna rods extends from the top left, giving it a classic retro appearance. A pink book and a small rectangular device rest on the top surface, adding to the lived-in, urban feel. The television sits on a simple, rectangular wooden table with four sturdy legs. The wood grain and textured surface details suggest a well-used, older appliance, suitable for nostalgic or urban environments.
description: A retro wooden television with a convex yellow-green screen, three large dials, and a metallic antenna, sitting on a wooden table with a pink book and a small device on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the convex screen, three dials, control buttons, antenna, and objects on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the textured wood, metallic dome antenna, and pink book on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, textured wooden back and the objects on top.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the pink book, wood texture, and the protruding dials on the front edge.
attribute_bezel_design: thick, metallic, silver-colored bezel with angular corners
attribute_control_button_layout: three large round dials in a vertical row on the front right, with additional buttons and switches on the top surface
